notes.1.1: Data export API at src/api/export.ts with CSV/JSON. Self-service export button in settings. No streaming/CDC.
notes.1.2: Account deletion at src/api/accounts/delete.ts with soft-delete and 30-day grace. Covers app DB but not AI context stores.
notes.1.3: Single region (us-east-1) documented in infrastructure. No region selection.
notes.1.4: Admin-configurable retention at src/admin/retention.ts. 30/90/365-day options per data type.
notes.2.1: Structured audit events at src/middleware/audit.ts. Covers auth, data, and AI actions with actor/resource/action fields.
notes.2.2: CSV download from admin UI. No API export or SIEM integration.
notes.2.4: Logs include actor_id, ip_address, user_agent, resource, action. Correlation IDs via request middleware.
notes.2.5: Basic alerting on bulk actions. No canary tokens.
notes.2.6: Rate limiting on login. No behavioral anomaly detection.
notes.3.1: SAML via passport-saml at src/auth/saml.ts. OIDC via openid-client. No SCIM.
notes.3.2: TOTP MFA at src/auth/mfa.ts using speakeasy. Org-level enforcement. No WebAuthn.
notes.3.3: Configurable session timeout (default 30min). Idle expiry. No concurrent session limits.
notes.3.4: bcrypt hashing, configurable password policy per org. No breached password checking.
notes.3.7: express-rate-limit on auth routes. Per-IP with account lockout after 5 failures.
notes.4.1: RBAC with admin/editor/viewer at src/auth/roles.ts. Configurable custom roles.
notes.4.2: CASL integration at src/middleware/authorization.ts. Attribute-based checks on resources.
notes.4.3: OAuth 2.0 with scoped JWT tokens. 1-hour expiry. Granular read/write/admin scopes.
notes.4.4: New users get 'viewer' role by default. Least-privilege documented.
notes.4.5: UUID resources with tenant_id WHERE clauses. No dedicated BOLA middleware.
notes.5.1: PostgreSQL RLS in migrations/20240801_add_rls.sql. tenant_id enforced at DB level.
notes.5.2: RLS + application-layer checks. Integration tests for cross-tenant queries at tests/isolation/.
notes.5.3: Per-tenant API rate limiting. No compute/storage quotas.
notes.6.1: TLS 1.3 in nginx.conf. HSTS header. No mTLS between services.
notes.6.2: AWS RDS encryption (platform default). No app-layer field encryption.
notes.6.3: AWS KMS referenced but no rotation schedule configured.
notes.6.4: AES-256-GCM via Node crypto. Documented in docs/crypto.md.
notes.7.1: Clerk integration at src/auth/clerk.ts. Managed identity platform.
notes.7.2: CASL library for authorization. Established in-process library.
notes.7.4: Redis sessions with httpOnly, secure, sameSite cookies. Established session library.
notes.8.1: Named accounts for prod. MFA required. No JIT access.
notes.8.2: Separate VPCs for staging/prod in terraform/. Private subnets for data layer.
notes.8.3: AWS Secrets Manager. Referenced in src/config/secrets.ts. No rotation.
notes.8.4: Lockfile committed, signed commits required. No SBOM or artifact signing.
notes.9.1: Dependabot at .github/dependabot.yml. Weekly updates for npm and docker.
notes.9.2: Semgrep in CI. No regular pen testing found.
notes.9.3: Security section in PR template. No formal threat modeling.
notes.9.4: Vulnerability response process documented. No public SLA.
notes.9.5: CODEOWNERS with basic ownership. No security champions program.
notes.9.6: Security label in issue tracker. No dedicated security program.
notes.9.7: Zod validation on all API inputs at src/middleware/validation.ts. CSP headers via helmet.
notes.10.1: security.txt at public/.well-known/security.txt with contact email.
notes.10.2: Status page at status.example.com. Email notification within 72 hours.
notes.10.4: Internal incident reviews. No published post-mortems.
notes.11.1: API consumer — uses OpenAI and Anthropic APIs. Privacy policy at src/pages/privacy.tsx documents AI data handling. Provider DPAs on file per docs/security/ai-providers.md. Both providers confirmed no-training on customer data. Opt-out toggle at src/components/Settings/AISettings.tsx disables AI features per org.
notes.11.2: Model selection between GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet at src/ai/config.ts. Model versions pinned in package.json (@anthropic-ai/sdk@0.39.0, openai@4.73.0). Temperature configurable per use case. No per-tenant model config.
notes.11.3: Langfuse integration at src/ai/observability.ts. Structured logging of prompt/response/latency/tokens/model_version. Per-tenant cost tracking dashboard. Logs exportable via API at src/api/ai-logs.ts with 90-day retention.
notes.11.4: OpenAI moderation API on outputs at src/ai/safety.ts. PII detection via @presidio/anonymizer. Custom content policy blocking harmful categories. No customer-configurable policies.
notes.11.5: Human review queue at src/components/AI/ReviewQueue.tsx for flagged outputs. No configurable escalation rules or kill switch.
notes.11.6: Input length limits at src/ai/validation.ts. Prompt injection detection via custom regex patterns and Anthropic's built-in filtering. System prompt isolation — user content passed as user messages only. No adversarial testing program.
notes.11.7: AI disclosure banner on all AI-powered features. Model card at docs/ai/model-card.md documenting capabilities and limitations. Per-feature AI indicators in UI.
notes.11.8: AI data policy in ToS. No granular opt-out per AI feature beyond the global toggle.
notes.11.9: API consumer — providers documented at docs/security/ai-providers.md (OpenAI us-east, Anthropic us-east). SDK versions pinned. Provider DPAs signed. Deprecation monitoring via provider changelogs. No formal change management for model version updates.
notes.11.10: Agent with 5 tools at src/ai/agent/tools/. Tool allowlist in src/ai/agent/config.ts. Read tools auto-approved, write tools require user confirmation at src/ai/agent/permissions.ts. MCP server at src/ai/mcp/ with restricted tool set. No delegation chains or IBAC.
notes.11.11: Conversation history with 24-hour TTL at src/ai/memory.ts. Tenant ID included in all AI context. System instructions separated from user content. Redis-backed with per-tenant key prefix. No encrypted context or memory poisoning defenses.
notes.12.1: Integrations page at src/components/Admin/Integrations.tsx listing connected apps.
notes.12.2: OAuth tokens with 90-day expiry. Refresh rotation in src/auth/oauth.ts.
notes.12.3: Predefined scopes (read, write, admin). No per-integration scope governance.
notes.12.4: API key identified in audit logs. No per-token actor identity.
notes.12.5: Connect/disconnect events logged. No integration activity stream.
notes.12.6: Self-service revoke in admin UI. No bulk revoke.
